name: PBFG
description: On impact, the PBFG traps nearby enemies in energy bubbles, dealing a large burst at the centre and heavy splash across a very wide area. Survivors take ongoing non-elemental damage over time alongside the gun's elemental effect. Excels at clearing crowds and can help secure a Second Wind under pressure. The non-elemental DoT also chips away at targets resistant to the weapon's element. Uses 2 ammo per shot.
notes:
Projectiles can damage enemies through walls and other cover.

Amp shields boost both the main shot and each individual energy orb.

The DoT is non-elemental; on Slag variants this DoT is not increased against slagged targets, making other elements plus a slag grenade generally stronger.
